command_summary: codex exec 0.144.1 --ephemeral --sandbox read-only --ignore-rules in the canonical repository with gpt-5.6-sol, max reasoning, canonical design-craft 0.5.0, and the exact benchmark prompt; final Markdown normalized only for trailing whitespace

style_authority.note: Preserves calm repeated-use utility motion and treats animation only as causal direct-manipulation feedback.

reference_selection.note: Applies motion quality, interaction physics, product, design-system, accessibility, and validation guidance precisely to the supplied gesture code.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Removes transition-all, whole-sheet scale, top-based tracking, fixed ease-in settlement, input locking, and decorative travel rather than adding animation.

evidence_level.note: Explicitly labels static source evidence and refuses to claim timing feel, frame performance, Reduced Motion behavior, or device quality as observed.

verified_boundary.note: Separates code-visible state and physics defects from unverified containing-block behavior, actual frame cost, touch arbitration, and runtime feel.

design_moves.note: Covers handle feedback, grab offset, pointer capture, 1:1 transform tracking, presentation-value interruption, velocity handoff, projection, hysteresis, soft bounds, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Stays entirely within motion behavior and validation, but the 490-line response is materially more expansive than the benchmark requires.
